untranslatable_reason: Flag pattern detection requires visual/structural pattern recognition (consolidation phase identification, trend prior to flag, breakout confirmation). The source material provides empirical outcomes (64% success rate bull, 40% avg rise, 22-25% avg decline, 17 days to target) but does not specify quantitative entry/exit thresholds. Pattern boundaries, consolidation range, and flag slope cannot be expressed with the allowed indicators. Volume confirmation mentioned as important but marked AUTHOR_SILENT. This signal requires pattern-matching logic beyond standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses Donchian breakouts as a proxy for flag breakout detection and SMA crossovers as trend reversal signals, but this does NOT capture the true flag pattern mechanics (prior trend + consolidation + breakout with reversal). The 17-day parameter is applied as hold_days_max. Success rates (64% bull, ~40% avg rise) and failure rate (11% at 5%) are informational but cannot be enforced in rule logic. A proper implementation would require custom pattern detection code.
